recent_bad_license_projects.name: pybanksy
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: BANKSY: Spatial Clustering Algorithm that Unifies Cell-Typing and Tissue Domain Segmentation. It reduces the spatial clustering problem to a previously solved problem--generic graph based clustering--by augmenting transcriptional signatures with transcriptional features averaged over spatial microenvironments.
recent_bad_license_projects.author_email: Nigel Chou <Nigel_Chou@gis.a-star.edu.sg>, Yifei Yue <yifei1021@gmail.com>, Vipul Singhal <vs@alumni.caltech.edu>
